author: SantiMod
content:
@everyone  Community Alpha Alert:  

Join our Twitter Spaces now to get the ALPHA and be the first to have a glimpse of what SCREAM will look like!

See what we mean when we say that one of our projects is in the "PROTOTYPING" stage in our Weekly Reports. 

We will also be discussing other updates and our contest with The Sandbox!
